case_title: METRO CAB VS. AUGUSTO GOMEZ PORTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,270.68 FILED BY METRO CAB AS TO DEFENDANT PORTO, AUGUSTO GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED AUG-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORTO, AUGUSTO GOMEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD HYBELS--CO. PARALEGAL.PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARIA TARANTINO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METRO CAB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTO, AUGUSTO GOMEZ $1,270.68 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,335.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PORTO, AUGUSTO GOMEZ
